title: NotionAI: Study, Plan, Build

modules.title: What NotionAI Actually Does (and What It Can't)
modules.sub: Set real expectations before you build anything
modules.description: Learners get an honest, hands-on look at NotionAI's actual capabilities versus the hype. You'll test core features side by side so you know exactly what to reach for—and what to skip—before building your system.

modules.title: Build Your Personal Study System in 20 Minutes
modules.sub: Go from blank page to working study hub fast
modules.description: You'll use NotionAI to spin up a study dashboard tailored to your own subjects, deadlines, and habits. By the end of the module you have a live system you'll actually open tomorrow, not a template you'll forget about.

modules.title: Project Planning Without the Overwhelm
modules.sub: Break big goals into steps you can actually follow
modules.description: Learners use NotionAI to decompose a real side project or assignment into manageable tasks, timelines, and priorities. You'll decide how to structure your boards so the plan works for your brain, not against it.

modules.title: Writing, Summarizing, and Drafting with NotionAI
modules.sub: Let AI handle the first draft so you handle the thinking
modules.description: You'll practice using NotionAI to summarize readings, draft outlines, and unblock your writing—without losing your own voice in the process. The module focuses on prompting strategies that get useful output on the first try.

modules.title: Make It Yours: Customize Your Workspace for Your Life
modules.sub: Tune your Notion setup so it actually fits your routine
modules.description: Learners audit their workspace and make deliberate choices about layouts, automations, and AI shortcuts that match how they really work. You'll leave with a personalized system that's easy to maintain and built to grow with you.

synopsis: You already have a million tabs open â NotionAI can help you actually organize your work, not just move it around. This course gets you productive fast with real setups for school, side projects, and everything in between.
rationale: Notion is one of the most widely used productivity tools among college students, but most users never unlock the AI layer â leaving serious time-saving potential on the table.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can build a fully functional AI-assisted study and project system in Notion tailored to your own goals and schedule.
source_signals: I am starting an AI+Education company
nearest_existing: The Cost Problem Nobody Talks About
